mercenary.name: Mercenary
mercenary.description: A balanced sword-for-hire who thrives on versatility. The Mercenary gains more stat points per level than any specialist, allowing adaptation to any combat situation.

passive_ability.name: Versatile
passive_ability.description: Gains +1 bonus stat point per level.

active_skill.name: Rally
active_skill.description: Inspires all allies, boosting ATK by 15% for 2 turns.

perk_tree.name: Iron Will
perk_tree.description: Reduces incoming damage by 5%. Years of thankless contracts have hardened this fighter's resolve.

perk_tree.name: Opportunist
perk_tree.description: Increases critical hit chance by 5%. A mercenary learns to strike when the enemy falters.

perk_tree.name: Battle-Scarred
perk_tree.description: Increases maximum HP by 10%. Each scar is a lesson paid for in blood.

perk_tree.name: Coin Hunter
perk_tree.description: Earns 15% more gold from victories. The mercenary always knows the value of a kill.

perk_tree.name: Adaptive Combat
perk_tree.description: Gains +1 defense for each hit taken during a fight, stacking up to 10. The mercenary reads the enemy's patterns mid-battle.

perk_tree.name: Dirty Fighting
perk_tree.description: Deals 10% bonus damage. No rules in the arena -- only survivors.

perk_tree.name: Sellsword Mastery
perk_tree.description: Steals 8% of damage dealt as HP. The crowd pays in gold; the blade pays in life.

perk_tree.name: Jack of All Trades
perk_tree.description: Reduces injury severity by 30%. A mercenary who can't fight tomorrow is a dead mercenary.

assassin.name: Assassin
assassin.description: A shadow-born killer who trades resilience for lethality. The Assassin strikes from blind angles, ending fights before the enemy can react.

passive_ability.name: Shadow Strike
passive_ability.description: Critical hits deal 25% bonus damage beyond the normal critical multiplier.

active_skill.name: Shadowstep
active_skill.description: Vanishes into shadow — next attack is a guaranteed crit and dodges the next enemy strike.

perk_tree.name: Keen Edge
perk_tree.description: Increases critical hit chance by 5%. The blade whispers where to bite deepest.

perk_tree.name: Fleet Foot
perk_tree.description: Increases dodge chance by 5%. The assassin is never where the blade falls.

perk_tree.name: Poisoned Blade
perk_tree.description: Deals 7% bonus damage. A thin coat of hemlock on the steel does the rest.

perk_tree.name: Evasion
perk_tree.description: Reduces incoming damage by 5%. Moving targets are harder to wound.

perk_tree.name: Throat Cutter
perk_tree.description: Heals 10% of max HP on kill. The arterial spray is warm and invigorating.

perk_tree.name: Expose Weakness
perk_tree.description: Gains +2 attack for each kill in a tournament round, stacking indefinitely. Each corpse reveals where the next will fall.

perk_tree.name: Death Mark
perk_tree.description: Critical hits ignore 20% of the target's defense. The assassin knows every gap in the armor.

perk_tree.name: Vanish
perk_tree.description: Resists 40% of status effects. Chains, poisons, curses -- none can hold a true shadow.

tank.name: Tank
tank.description: An immovable wall of scarred flesh and rusted iron. The Tank outlasts every opponent, turning the arena into a war of attrition that only the patient can win.

passive_ability.name: Unbreakable
passive_ability.description: Takes 10% less damage from all sources.

active_skill.name: Shield Wall
active_skill.description: Raises an impenetrable guard, reducing all incoming damage to the team by 50% for 2 turns.

perk_tree.name: Thick Skin
perk_tree.description: Increases maximum HP by 10%. The scar tissue is thicker than most men's shields.

perk_tree.name: Brace
perk_tree.description: Reduces incoming damage by an additional 5%. Plant the feet. Endure.

perk_tree.name: Retribution
perk_tree.description: Deals 5% bonus damage. Slow strikes still break bones.

perk_tree.name: Fortified
perk_tree.description: Gains +1 defense for each hit taken during a fight, stacking up to 15. Every blow tempers the iron beneath the skin.

perk_tree.name: Undying
perk_tree.description: Steals 5% of damage dealt as HP. The arena floor drinks blood; the Tank reclaims it.

perk_tree.name: Iron Body
perk_tree.description: Reduces injury severity by 25%. Bones knit crooked but they knit fast.

perk_tree.name: Colossus
perk_tree.description: Increases maximum HP by 20%. The crowd goes silent when the colossus enters the arena.

perk_tree.name: Last Stand
perk_tree.description: Resists 50% of status effects. Poison slows but does not stop. Fire burns but does not fell.

berserker.name: Berserker
berserker.description: A frothing brute who channels agony into annihilation. The Berserker grows deadlier as wounds mount, transforming the arena into a blood-soaked altar of rage.

passive_ability.name: Blood Fury
passive_ability.description: Damage increases as HP drops, up to +50% at 10% HP.

active_skill.name: Frenzy
active_skill.description: Enters a blood rage, attacking 3 times this turn at 80% damage each.

perk_tree.name: Brute Force
perk_tree.description: Deals 5% bonus damage. Subtlety is for the living.

perk_tree.name: Thick Skull
perk_tree.description: Increases maximum HP by 8%. The skull is dented but intact -- always intact.

perk_tree.name: Bloodlust
perk_tree.description: Heals 8% of max HP on kill. The taste of death fuels the frenzy.

perk_tree.name: Reckless Swing
perk_tree.description: Increases critical hit chance by 8%. Wild swings find soft places between the ribs.

perk_tree.name: Gore
perk_tree.description: Gains +3 attack for each kill in a tournament round, stacking indefinitely. Each death feeds the next.

perk_tree.name: Pain is Fuel
perk_tree.description: Steals 6% of damage dealt as HP. The berserker drinks from his own wounds.

perk_tree.name: Rampage
perk_tree.description: Deals 15% bonus damage. When the red mist descends, even iron screams.

perk_tree.name: Defy Death
perk_tree.description: Reduces injury severity by 35%. Broken bones mend wrong, but the berserker fights on regardless.

retiarius.name: Retiarius
retiarius.description: A net-and-trident fighter who dances at the edge of reach. The Retiarius punishes aggression, turning the enemy's momentum into a weapon.

passive_ability.name: Net Mastery
passive_ability.description: Counter-attacks on successful dodge, dealing 50% of normal damage.

active_skill.name: Net Throw
active_skill.description: Hurls a weighted net, stunning the current target for 2 turns.

perk_tree.name: Nimble
perk_tree.description: Increases dodge chance by 5%. The net-fighter flows like water around the blade.

perk_tree.name: Trident Thrust
perk_tree.description: Increases critical hit chance by 5%. Three prongs, three chances to find the gap.

perk_tree.name: Entangle
perk_tree.description: Deals 7% bonus damage. The net tightens; the trident follows.

perk_tree.name: Slippery
perk_tree.description: Reduces incoming damage by 5%. What the net-fighter cannot dodge, he deflects.

perk_tree.name: Riposte
perk_tree.description: Counter-attacks on dodge deal 75% damage instead of 50%. The trident punishes every missed swing.

perk_tree.name: Crowd Favorite
perk_tree.description: Earns 20% more gold from victories. The mob adores the dancing killer.

perk_tree.name: Web of Steel
perk_tree.description: Increases dodge chance by 10%. The net-fighter becomes untouchable -- a phantom draped in iron mesh.

perk_tree.name: Crippling Snare
perk_tree.description: Resists 35% of status effects and reduces enemy dodge by 10%. The net binds more than flesh.

medicus.name: Medicus
medicus.description: A battlefield surgeon turned gladiator, wielding anatomical knowledge as a weapon. The Medicus outlasts foes through relentless self-repair, bleeding them dry while stitching his own wounds between blows.

passive_ability.name: Field Surgery
passive_ability.description: Heals 3% of max HP per turn in battle.

active_skill.name: Mass Heal
active_skill.description: Channels healing energy, restoring 20% max HP to all allies.

perk_tree.name: Triage
perk_tree.description: Increases maximum HP by 8%. Knowing where the blood flows means knowing how to keep it inside.

perk_tree.name: Anatomical Precision
perk_tree.description: Increases critical hit chance by 5%. The medicus knows exactly where to cut.

perk_tree.name: Numbing Salve
perk_tree.description: Reduces incoming damage by 5%. A poultice applied mid-fight dulls the sharpest wound.

perk_tree.name: Leech Craft
perk_tree.description: Steals 4% of damage dealt as HP. The scalpel takes and the surgeon reclaims.

perk_tree.name: Bone Setter
perk_tree.description: Reduces injury severity by 30%. Dislocations reset mid-round, fractures splinted between bouts.

perk_tree.name: Venom Knowledge
perk_tree.description: Resists 35% of status effects. The medicus has swallowed every poison in small doses.

perk_tree.name: Resurgence
perk_tree.description: Per-turn healing increases to 5% of max HP. The body becomes a furnace of renewal -- flesh knits before the crowd can gasp.

perk_tree.name: Do No Harm
perk_tree.description: Deals 12% bonus damage. The oath was abandoned long ago -- now the scalpel serves only the arena.
